papers.title: Veligrotug versus Placebo in Active Thyroid Eye Disease
papers.abstract: In a randomized, double-blind phase-3 trial of veligrotug in active TED, mean proptosis reduction at week 24 was 2.4 mm greater than placebo (p<0.001).
key_findings: primary endpoint met with 2.4 mm proptosis delta
papers.verbatim_quote: Mean reduction in proptosis at week 24 was 2.4 mm greater in the veligrotug group than in the placebo group (95% CI, 1.9 to 2.9; P<0.001).

synthesis.summary: Veligrotug's THRIVE phase-3 pivotal showed clinically and statistically significant proptosis reduction with a class-consistent safety profile. The signal is strong enough that label expansion is the likeliest open question, not approval itself.
kill_conditions: hearing AE rate above 15% (vs class precedent)

query_used: veligrotug AND (thyroid eye disease OR Graves orbitopathy) AND phase 3
